docket_entries.description: PLAINTIFF'S DECLARATION FILED. DEFENDANTS NOT SERVED. REQUEST RESET.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-17-2000, OFF CALENDAR

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GARCIA, MANUELA AS TO DEFENDANT COLLA, JOHN  #324 SFPD SUHR, GREGORY  #887 SFPD CASTRO, ADRIAN  SFPD  #845 MEDINA, ALEXANDRA  SFPD  #1569 EVANS, JOHN  #1820 CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SFPD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2000 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT ABOVE MATTER BE PLACED ON COURT'S 1/16/00 AT 1:30PM CALENDAR FOR TRIAL. CASE #786875 IS TO BE HEARD AT SAME TIME AS CASES
